# Docker Compose Stack — Container Reference (v0.1.69)

**Service:** SG Playwright EC2  
**Compose file:** `/opt/sg-playwright/docker-compose.yml` (generated by `sp create` / `scripts/provision_ec2.py`)  
**Network:** all containers share `sg-net` (bridge)

---

## Container Map

```
Internet
  │
  ├─ :8000 ──► playwright          (FastAPI browser automation API)
  ├─ :8001 ──► agent-mitmproxy     (proxy admin API)
  └─ :3000 ──► browser-proxy       (nginx HTTPS → KasmVNC browser UI)
                    │
                    └──► browser   (linuxserver/chromium — internal only)

sg-net (internal only)
  ├─ agent-mitmproxy :8080  ◄── playwright (all browser traffic routed through proxy)
  │                         ◄── browser   (Chrome launched with --proxy-server=)
  ├─ cadvisor        :8080  ◄── prometheus
  ├─ node-exporter   :9100  ◄── prometheus
  └─ prometheus      :9090  ──► AMP (remote_write, SigV4)

fluent-bit reads /var/lib/docker/containers/**/*.log ──► OpenSearch (AWS_Auth SigV4)
```

---

## Services

### `playwright`
| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Image | `<account>.dkr.ecr.eu-west-2.amazonaws.com/sgraph_ai_service_playwright:latest` |
| Port | `:8000` (public, API-key gated) |
| Auth | `X-API-Key` header — value set at provision time |
| Proxy | All browser traffic routed through `http://agent-mitmproxy:8080` |
| Restart | `always` |

The core service. Exposes the FastAPI browser automation API. Chromium runs headless inside
the container. Every HTTP request made by the browser passes through agent-mitmproxy.

---

### `agent-mitmproxy`
| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Image | `<account>.dkr.ecr.eu-west-2.amazonaws.com/agent_mitmproxy:latest` |
| Port | `:8001` (public admin API, API-key gated); `127.0.0.1:18080` (mitmweb UI, loopback only) |
| Auth | `X-API-Key` header (same key as playwright) |
| Restart | `always` |

Transparent HTTPS proxy. Intercepts all browser traffic for inspection, filtering, and
upstream-proxy chaining. The mitmweb UI (port 18080) is loopback-only — reach it via:

```bash
sp exec <name> -- socat TCP-LISTEN:18080,fork TCP:localhost:18080
# or: sp forward 18080 <name>
```

Optional upstream proxy: set `AGENT_MITMPROXY__UPSTREAM_URL` env var at provision time.

---

### `browser`
| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Image | `lscr.io/linuxserver/chromium:latest` |
| Port | Internal only (no host port mapping) — accessed via `browser-proxy` |
| Auth | KasmVNC `PASSWD` = same API key value as playwright/sidecar |
| Proxy | `--proxy-server=http://agent-mitmproxy:8080` via `CHROME_CLI` env var |
| Restart | `unless-stopped` |

A streaming browser (KasmVNC) pre-wired through agent-mitmproxy. Provides a manual
"human in the loop" view of what the proxy sees. All traffic is visible in the mitmweb UI.

Not directly port-mapped — HTTPS termination is handled by `browser-proxy`.

---

### `browser-proxy`
| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Image | `nginx:alpine` |
| Port | `:3000` (public HTTPS — self-signed cert, browser warning expected) |
| Config | `/opt/sg-playwright/config/nginx-browser.conf` (written by user-data at boot) |
| Cert | `/opt/sg-playwright/config/browser-certs/` (generated by openssl at boot, 10yr) |
| Auth | HTTP Basic Auth — username `viewer`, password = API key value |
| Restart | `unless-stopped` |

Nginx reverse proxy that terminates HTTPS in front of `browser` and enforces HTTP Basic
Auth before traffic reaches KasmVNC. KasmVNC also requires a secure context — plain HTTP
triggers an in-app error. The self-signed cert causes a browser warning; click
**Advanced → Proceed**.

Access: `https://<public-ip>:3000`
- Browser will prompt for credentials.
- Username: `viewer`
- Password: API key value shown in `sp create` output

The `.htpasswd` file is written to `/opt/sg-playwright/config/browser-certs/.htpasswd`
(mode 600, APR1-hashed) at boot and mounted read-only into the container.

---

### `cadvisor`
| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Image | `gcr.io/cadvisor/cadvisor:v0.49.1` |
| Port | Internal `:8080` (scraped by prometheus) |
| Mounts | `/`, `/var/run`, `/sys`, `/var/lib/docker` (read-only) |
| Restart | `always` |

Exports per-container CPU, memory, network, and disk I/O metrics in Prometheus format.
Requires `privileged: true` to read cgroup data. Not externally exposed.

---

### `node-exporter`
| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Image | `prom/node-exporter:v1.7.0` |
| Port | Internal `:9100` (scraped by prometheus) |
| Mounts | `/proc`, `/sys`, `/` (read-only, via bind mounts) |
| Restart | `always` |

Exports host-level metrics: CPU, memory, disk, network, filesystem. Excludes virtual
filesystems (`/sys`, `/proc`, `/dev`, `/host`, `/etc`) from filesystem collector.

---

### `prometheus`
| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Image | `prom/prometheus:v2.51.0` |
| Port | Internal `:9090` (SSM tunnel only — `sp forward-prometheus <name>`) |
| Config | `/opt/sg-playwright/config/prometheus.yml` (written by user-data at boot) |
| Storage | `prometheus_data` volume — 24h local retention |
| Restart | `always` |

Scrapes cadvisor and node-exporter every 15s. When `AMP_REMOTE_WRITE_URL` is set at
provision time, remote-writes all metrics to Amazon Managed Prometheus using SigV4 auth
via the EC2 instance role. No credentials embedded.

Local access via SSM:
```bash
sp forward-prometheus <name>
# → http://localhost:9090
```

---

### `fluent-bit`
| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Image | `amazon/aws-for-fluent-bit:stable` |
| Port | None |
| Config | `/opt/sg-playwright/config/fluent-bit.conf` (written by user-data at boot) |
| Mounts | `/var/lib/docker/containers` (read-only log tailing), `/var/run/docker.sock` |
| Restart | `always` |

Tails all container log files from the Docker log directory. Enriches each record with
`stack=sg-playwright` and `environment=<stage>` fields. When `OPENSEARCH_ENDPOINT` is
set at provision time, ships to Amazon OpenSearch Service using AWS_Auth (SigV4 via
instance role). Falls back to stdout when endpoint is not configured.

Index created: `sg-playwright-logs` — time field `@timestamp`.

---

## Port Summary

| Port | Protocol | Exposure | Service | Auth |
|------|----------|----------|---------|------|
| 8000 | HTTP | Public | playwright | X-API-Key |
| 8001 | HTTP | Public | agent-mitmproxy admin | X-API-Key |
| 3000 | HTTPS | Public | browser-proxy → KasmVNC | HTTP Basic Auth (user: `viewer`, pass: API key) + KasmVNC PASSWD |
| 8080 | HTTP | Docker network only | agent-mitmproxy proxy | none (internal) |
| 9090 | HTTP | SSM tunnel only | prometheus | none (internal) |
| 18080 | HTTP | Loopback only | mitmweb UI | none (internal) |
| 9100 | HTTP | Docker network only | node-exporter | none (internal) |

---

## Updating the Running Stack

```bash
# Restart a single container after config change
sp exec <name> -- docker compose -f /opt/sg-playwright/docker-compose.yml restart fluent-bit

# View live logs for a container
sp logs <name> fluent-bit

# Pull a newer image and restart
sp exec <name> -- bash -c "
  docker pull lscr.io/linuxserver/chromium:latest
  docker compose -f /opt/sg-playwright/docker-compose.yml up -d --no-deps browser browser-proxy
"
```
